channel.title: Blog on Larry Thul
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Larry Thul

item.title: A Learned Alphabet for Market Signals: Tokenizing Time Series for LLM-Style Forecasting (Part 1)
item.description: The main contribution of Part 1: a discrete, learned vocabulary of signal shapes that turns market data into tokens an LLM-style stack can consume. Pretraining on top is early and in progress; RLVR for alpha is where the series is headed.

item.title: Employee Spotlight: Larry Thul
item.description: An Optimal Dynamics employee spotlight on my path from Princeton and CASTLE Lab to leading the Statistics and Machine Learning team, rebuilding the data engine, and bringing agentic AI to the platform.
